mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_id, username, password, role, email, phone, balance, points, member_level, member_expire_date, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{balance}, #{points}, #{memberLevel}, #{memberExpireDate}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET balance = #{balance} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET points = #{points} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET balance = balance + #{amount} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET balance = balance - #{amount} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND balance >= #{amount}
UPDATE users SET points = points + #{points} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET points = points - #{points} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND points >= #{points}
UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, phone = #{phone} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
